meta.description: Refactor pyroj to stdlib-only datetime-aligned Kurdish and multi-calendar support. Import into Task Master AI or any task runner that accepts JSON task lists.
meta.branch_strategy: Feature work on refactor/* branches; merge to develop via PR or reviewed merge; release from main.

tasks.title: Repository and packaging baseline
tasks.description: Modernize packaging (pyproject.toml), set python_requires >= 3.10, optional [dev] extras for pytest/mypy/ruff. Remove runtime dependency on persiantools.

subtasks.title: Add pyproject.toml with project metadata and tool configs
Deprecate setup.py or keep as thin shim for backward compatibility
Document supported Python versions in README

tasks.title: Core Julian day and Gregorian bridge
tasks.description: Implement JDN <-> Gregorian using the same numeric model as KurdishDate (dateConverter.ts). Unit-test against known astronomical/calendar tables.

subtasks.title: gregorian_to_jdn and jdn_to_gregorian with leap rules

tasks.title: Persian (Jalali) solar calendar
tasks.description: Port persianToJulianDay / julianDayToPersian and isSolarLeap from KurdishDate. No external libs.

subtasks.title: Days per month and year boundaries

tasks.title: Tabular Islamic calendar
tasks.description: Implement islamicToJulianDay / julianDayToIslamic and isIslamicLeap as in KurdishDate (tabular model; document divergence from official moon sighting).

tasks.title: Kurdish solar date type and KurdishEra
tasks.description: Introduce KurdishDate (and optional KurdishDateTime): default era = Persian+1321; optional Nineveh-era module behind explicit API. Match legacy Rojjmer behavior where intentional.

subtasks.title: Define KurdishEra enum and year conversion policies
Document difference vs 612 BCE literature formula

tasks.title: Locales: Kurdish dialects, Arabic, Persian, Turkish, Gregorian labels
tasks.description: Registry for month names, weekdays, abbreviations; scripts (Latin/Arabic); optional second names (e.g. Newroz). Mirror structure of KurdishDate locales (en, fa, ku) plus tr.

subtasks.title: Kurmanci / Sorani / Hawrami data modules (minimum viable)
Islamic month names in Kurdish and Arabic transliteration

tasks.title: Exceptions and logging
tasks.description: PyrojValueError, PyrojRangeError; module loggers; debug traces behind PYROJ_DEBUG env flag.

tasks.title: Documentation and examples
tasks.description: Sphinx or mkdocs (optional); README examples: convert now, Kurdish Newroz day, Islamic side-by-side; migration from Rojjmer.

subtasks.title: docstrings on all public APIs (Google or NumPy style)

tasks.title: CI, coverage, and pre-commit
tasks.description: GitHub Actions or GitLab CI: pytest, ruff, mypy; coverage threshold; secret scanning recommendation.

tasks.title: Deprecation and removal of legacy Rojjmer API
tasks.description: Ship compatibility shim rojjmer -> new types with DeprecationWarning; remove in major version bump.
